series_metadata.series_description: Investigative proceedings are files that document the activities of the Board staff in investigating complaints and possible disciplinary actions against licensees, including: public complaint forms and attached documentation, correspondence to and from the complainant and/or respondent, referral notices from external agencies, court proceedings and outcomes, licensing information, field call photographs and summaries, cease and desist notices, notice of opportunity for hearing letters, hearing scheduling letters, interview and phone notes, hearing exhibits, hearing outcome letters, adjudication orders, revocation notices, court filings, subpoenas, close case letters and requests for information/documents.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: If proceedings result in board action, scanned, or five years; adjudication Orders are maintained as part of 889-0016. If investigation does not result in board action, scanned, or two years. ; Electronic: Five years If proceedings result in board action; adjudication Orders are maintained as part of license file under 889-0016; If investigation does not result in board action, scanned, or two years
